column1: # VISCACHA III Table 1: Magellanic Bridge and Counter-Bridge star clusters.
# Age, [Fe/H]_CMD, E(B-V), distance, RVhel, and proper motions come from Dias et al. 2021.
# Structure supplements come from Santos et al. 2020 VISCACHA II (CDS J/MNRAS/498/205)
# where available, otherwise Bica et al. 2020 (CDS J/AJ/159/82) catalog angular sizes.
# Empty Vint or structural fields mean the build must keep an existing matched value or
# fall back to a clearly flagged estimate.
